description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-popover

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Background, shadow, border, arrow. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Focus management. Escape to dismiss. aria-describedby linking. Role based on content.
3. **Functionality** — Trigger (click/hover/focus). Positioning (12 placements). Arrow. Click-outside dismiss. Nested popovers. Animation.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Arrow rendering. Z-index. Max-width.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Trigger modes. Positioning. Dismiss. Keyboard.
8. **Storybook** — Click/hover/focus triggers. All placements. Rich content. Arrow.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-popover
